Download
Version 2.0.0 · 100% Offline · No Subscription

The complete school,
running entirely offline.

TRIOS® is a fully offline school management system built for Sri Lankan schools. Students, teachers, timetables, exams, marks & ID cards — no internet, no server, no monthly fee.

Download for Windows Discover Features Meet the Creator

Windows · v1.0.0 · ~free, offline installer

11+

Modules

100%

Offline

4

Access Roles

NIE

SL Curriculum

100% Offline

Works without internet. Every record is stored locally on the device using IndexedDB — no server required, ever.

Local-First Storage

Powered by Dexie.js on top of IndexedDB. Your school's data never leaves the device — private and resilient.

Role-Based Access

Four tailored access levels — Admin, Principal, Teacher & Student — each with its own views and permissions.

Specifications

Everything a school needs

A complete administration workflow aligned with the Sri Lanka NIE curriculum — Primary, Secondary, GCE O/L & A/L.

Why TRIOS

Enterprise-grade.
Zero infrastructure.

TRIOS® brings powerful school management to every school — regardless of connectivity, budget, or IT staff. Install once and run forever.
